hero.title: We are a software development firm specialized in <1>custom solutions for Industry 4.0</1>
hero.description: Digitalization of industrial processes, integration of complex systems, and supply chain optimization through high-performance web and mobile technologies.
mision.title: Mission
mision.text: Provide innovative technological solutions that enable industrial companies to achieve operational excellence through digitalization and complete control of their real-time data.
vision.title: Vision
vision.text: Consolidate as leaders in software development for the manufacturing sector, recognized for our ability to solve critical traceability and efficiency problems through technology.
valores.precision.text: Robust systems with minimal margin of error
valores.compromiso.text: Focused on our clients' business results
valores.transparencia.text: Integrity in information management and project management
problema.title: ElectrónicaNova: The critical digital gap
problema.1: Manual Registration: PCB serial numbers recorded on paper or Excel, preventing automatic and reliable traceability
problema.2: Information Silos: Quality and Production departments don't share real-time data; defects detected late
problema.3: Operational Invisibility: Management unaware of the real economic impact of line stops (OEE metrics)
problema.4: Reactive Decision Making: Without current indicators, supervisors could only act after problems already affected shift goals
solucion.title: Three-layer digital ecosystem
solucion.web.title: Web Floor Management
solucion.web.text: Platform for operators and supervisors to manage production orders and scan components, ensuring each piece has a unique digital history.
solucion.movil.title: Mobile Control (Android)
solucion.movil.text: Native application for managers and maintenance technicians that allows viewing efficiency dashboards (OEE) in real-time, receiving push notifications for critical failures, and capturing photographic evidence of defects on the line.
solucion.api.title: Data Core (REST API)
solucion.api.text: A centralized architecture that connects both platforms, ensuring quality and production information is immediately available for strategic decision-making.
equipo.title: The talent behind the technology
contacto.title: Ready to digitalize your operation?
contacto.text: Let's talk about how Orión Technologies can transform your production line with real-time traceability.
